channel.title: Bottle Rocket Growth Insights
channel.description: Tactical writing on LinkedIn outbound, ICP frameworks, signal-based prospecting, and B2B GTM from Bottle Rocket Growth.

item.title: How to Define an ICP That Actually Converts in B2B Outbound
item.dc:creator: Mike Cubberly
item.description: A four-layer framework for defining an ICP that drives real conversion in B2B outbound: firmographics, technographics, buyer persona, and trigger signals.

item.title: Signal-Based List Building: A Framework for B2B Outbound in 2026
item.dc:creator: Mike Cubberly
item.description: How to build signal-based prospect lists using Apollo, Clay, TheirStack, and LinkedIn Sales Navigator. Covers structural, technology, and intent signals.

item.title: LinkedIn Sender Profile Strategy: Borrowed vs Client-Owned
item.dc:creator: Mike Cubberly
item.description: The tradeoffs between borrowed (DFY) and client-owned (IOY) LinkedIn sender profiles for outbound. Includes warmup protocols and selection criteria.

item.title: HeyReach Sequence Architecture: Building Campaigns That Book Meetings
item.dc:creator: Mike Cubberly
item.description: How to architect a HeyReach LinkedIn outbound campaign end-to-end: sequence structure, message length, timing, branching logic, and metrics that matter.
